sider.title: Teams
sider.deleteConfirmContent: Diese Aktion kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden.

stopAgentFailed: Konnte diesen Agenten nicht stoppen. Bitte versuche es erneut.

create.title: Team erstellen
create.supportedAgentsHint: Unterstützt derzeit Claude und Codex. Weitere Agenten folgen bald.
create.leaderDesc: Versteht deine Ziele und koordiniert Agenten zur Aufgabenerledigung

removeAgent.confirmContent: Dieses Mitglied ist aktuell aktiv. Trotzdem entfernen?

emptyState.subtitle: Beschreibe dein Ziel und ich bringe das Team an die Arbeit

suggestions.debate: Eine Debatte mit Agenten auf verschiedenen Seiten organisieren
suggestions.interview: Ein eingehendes Interview zwischen Agenten planen
suggestions.expert_review: Mehrere Experten das gleiche Problem analysieren lassen

runtime.title: Available agent runtimes
runtime.description: {{count}} installed runtime(s) were found on this computer. Trace will use these to power assistants and team runs.

default.title: Choose your default team agent
default.description: This default is used to preselect the team leader when you create a new team from this setup flow.

run.title: Run the team tour
run.description: Send a real prompt to this team. The leader can coordinate teammates or custom agents so you can see how the workflow behaves.
run.defaultPrompt: Set up a reusable agent team for general software work. Use only user-configured runtimes; do not use Aion CLI or aionrs. Inspect the current team and available runtimes, then create these agents if missing: Frontend Engineer, Backend Engineer, QA Engineer, and Product Manager. Ping each agent once to confirm its role and readiness. If creation is blocked, say what is missing and how to finish setup in Trace. End with a short checklist of agents created and pinged.
run.currentTeamLabel: Current team will run this prompt
run.defaultNote: Your default agent choice is saved for new teams; this run uses the leader already configured on the current team.
run.started: Tour prompt sent to the team
run.failed: Failed to start the team tour
